activities_projects.title: Atmospheric Pressure Measurement Model
activities_projects.objective: Understand and measure atmospheric pressure changes
steps: Cut the balloon and stretch it over the mouth of the jar
Secure it tightly with a rubber band
Attach a straw on the stretched balloon surface
Place chart paper with scale markings behind the straw
Observe straw movement over several days
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns how atmospheric pressure changes can be detected using a barometer model
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of observations and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Investigating Pressure and Surface Area
activities_projects.objective: Quantitatively analyze the relationship between force, area, and pressure
materials: Wooden blocks with different base areas
steps: Place blocks with different base areas on sand
Apply equal weights on each block
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops understanding of pressure calculation and experimental analysis

activities_projects.title: Air Pressure and Wind Flow Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Study how pressure differences cause air movement
steps: Inflate one balloon and connect it to an uninflated balloon using a straw
Secure connections to avoid air leakage
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands how air moves from high pressure to low pressure areas

activities_projects.title: Cyclone Formation Demonstration Model
activities_projects.objective: Understand how cyclones form due to pressure differences
steps: Attach the second bottle using a connector
Observe vortex formation representing cyclone motion
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Visualizes rotating air movement in cyclones

activities_projects.title: High-Speed Air and Pressure Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Observe pressure reduction due to fast-moving air
steps: Hang two balloons close to each other
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands Bernoulli-type pressure effects in airflow

activities_projects.title: Storm Impact Data Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyze real cyclone or storm data
steps: Collect data on a recent cyclone
Note wind speed, rainfall, and affected areas
Prepare a chart showing the impact
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects physics concepts to real-world weather events

activities_projects.title: Pressure Distribution Investigation
steps: Make holes at different heights on the bottle
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns that pressure increases with depth

activities_projects.title: Lightning Safety Awareness Project
activities_projects.objective: Understand lightning hazards and safety measures
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands lightning formation and protection methods

activities_projects.title: Cyclone Preparedness Planning
steps: Present the plan in class discussion
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands disaster management and cyclone preparedness
